plugin.name: touchpad-gesture-drag
plugin._long: Allows you to hold and drag fingers on a multi-touch touchpad to perform drag-and-drop

option.name: fingers
option._long: How many fingers to use for the drag-and-drop gesture

option.name: threshold
option._long: How many milliseconds are required between starting a hold (putting the fingers on the touchpad and not moving) and starting to move the fingers for the gesture to register
